inputs.resume_text:
Priya Desai
priya.desai@email.com | +91-8765432109 | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/priya-desai
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Aspiring Data Scientist with 1.5 years of industry experience and a solid academic background in statistics and machine
learning. Comfortable with Python, basic NLP tasks, and data visualization. Looking to grow into LLM engineering and
build production-level AI systems.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn), SQL, basic R
ML / AI: Regression, Classification, Clustering, Basic NLP (TF-IDF, NLTK), introductory LLM usage
Visualization: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Power BI (beginner)
Cloud: AWS S3 (basic), Google Colab
WORK EXPERIENCE
Junior Data Analyst | Syntel Solutions, Nagpur | Jan 2023 – Present
 Performed exploratory data analysis on customer sales data using Pandas and Matplotlib.
 Built a logistic regression model to predict customer churn with 78% accuracy.
 Created weekly performance dashboards in Power BI for the sales team.
 Assisted senior data scientists in data cleaning and feature engineering tasks.
Data Science Intern | TechMinds Pvt. Ltd., Nagpur | Jun 2022 – Dec 2022
 Explored sentiment classification using NLTK and Naive Bayes on product review datasets.
 Assisted in building a basic recommendation system using collaborative filtering.
EDUCATION
B.Sc. in Statistics & Computer Science – RTM Nagpur University (2022)
TOOLS & TECHNOLOGIES
Python, Jupyter Notebook, SQL, Git (basic), Power BI, Google Colab, NLTK, Scikit-learn
CERTIFICATIONS
 Machine Learning by Andrew Ng – Coursera (2022)
 IBM Data Science Professional Certificate (2023)

outputs.output:
## Candidate Snapshot
- Name: Priya Desai
- Current Role: Junior Data Analyst
- Total Experience (if explicitly stated): 1.5 years

## Skills
- Technical Skills: Python, SQL, R, Machine Learning, Data Visualization
- Tools/Platforms: Jupyter Notebook, Git, Power BI, Google Colab, AWS S3
- Domains: Statistics, Machine Learning, Data Science

## Education & Certifications
- Education: B.Sc. in Statistics & Computer Science – RTM Nagpur University (2022)
- Certifications: Machine Learning by Andrew Ng – Coursera (2022), IBM Data Science Professional Certificate (2023)

## Key Evidence
- Performed exploratory data analysis on customer sales data using Pandas and Matplotlib.
- Built a logistic regression model to predict customer churn with 78% accuracy.
- Explored sentiment classification using NLTK and Naive Bayes on product review datasets.
- Assisted in building a basic recommendation system using collaborative filtering.
- Completed certifications in Machine Learning and Data Science from Coursera and IBM respectively.
